mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT( REPLACE(UPPER(modules.name), ' ', '_'), '_', CASE WHEN modules.name LIKE '%(%)%' THEN UPPER( TRIM( TRAILING ')' FROM SUBSTRING_INDEX( SUBSTRING_INDEX(modules.name, '(', -1), ')', 1 ) ) ) ELSE 'VIEW' END ) AS permission FROM permissions INNER JOIN modules ON modules.id = permissions.module_id WHERE permissions.group_id IN ( SELECT group_id FROM user_groups WHERE user_id = #{userId} )
